Tests the immutability of `Number.NEGATIVE_INFINITY` by attempting to delete it.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that checks the immutability of the `Number.NEGATIVE_INFINITY` property in JavaScript. The `assert` statement verifies that attempting to delete `Number.NEGATIVE_INFINITY` returns `false`, which confirms that this property is non-configurable and cannot be removed from the `Number` object. This test ensures compliance with the ECMAScript specification, which defines `Number.NEGATIVE_INFINITY` as a read-only property. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing solely on validating the behavior of a specific built-in JavaScript property.
